message:
fix(sync): atomic manifest write via durable_rename (beads_rust-jnxv)

Replace direct fs::write for .manifest.json with write-to-temp +
sync_all + durable_rename pattern, matching the existing JSONL export
atomicity guarantees. A crash or ENOSPC during manifest write can no
longer leave a torn/corrupt file.

Add 4 regression tests: valid JSON after flush, no temp files left
behind, pre-existing manifest untouched without --manifest flag,
and atomic overwrite of old manifest content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
